titleStmt.title: SII 42.12: original edition by C Somasundara Rao
No. 12. (A.R. No. B. 17 of 1953-54.) Mallāguṇḍla, Tadipatri Taluk, Anantapur District, Andhra Pradesh.

summary.p: On a slab near the Āñjanēya temple.
The record is dated in Śaka 1534, Vīrōdhikṛit, Pushya, śu. 5. Vīrōdhikṛit corresponds to Śaka 1533. It so, the date would be A.D. 1611, December 29.

Registers a gift of money derived from the mānya lands of the temple to god Kāśī-Viśvēśvara of Mallāguṇḍla by Paruvata-nāyuḍu, son of Tiruveṅgaḷappa and grandson of (name not clear) of the Toṇḍipāḷḷa-gōtra for worship and offerings and for the procession of the deity along the streets. The gift is said to have been made for the merit of Pemmasāni Timmā-nāyuḍu.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p: Figures of Sun, trident, liṅga, ḍamaru and crescent-moon.

Avighnamastu . svasti śrī
vijayādbhu(bhyu)daya śālivāhana
śakavaruṣaṁbulu 1534 Agunē
ṭi virōdhikru(kṛ)tu saṁvatsara puṣya śu 5 lū
śrīmadrājādhirāja rājaparamēśvara śrī
vīrapratāpa śrī veṁkaṭapatidēvamahārā
julugāru penugoṁḍḍa ratnasiṁhvāsa
namaṁdu pṛthivī sāṁbra(mrā)jyaṁ śē(sē)yucuṁ
ḍā(ḍaṁ)gānu toṁḍipāḷla gōtrulaina naralīvu
taperōtanagāri pautṛ(tru)laina tiruveṁgaḷapa
gāri putṛ(tru)laina paruvatanāyanigāru Akhilā
ṁḍakōṭi braṁhmāṁḍa nāyakuṁḍaina paśca(ści)ma
vāha(hi)nī kṣīranadītīranivāsiyaina rudrapā
gōdhaccadhavilanītuḍaina caṁdraśikhakōṭi
nāgābharaṇabhūṣaṇuṁḍaina pā¨rvvatī sē
thupa ba ha nāgū ḍuḍaina pramatha
gaṇasēvituḍaina mallaguṁḍlu sthalamaṁdu vu
nnakāśīviśvēśvaruniki saṁkrāṁti
puṇyakālamaṁdu Anaṁttamulugā daṁḍamulu
sama¨rppiṁcci yī (Ī)śvaruni mānyaṁ mīdunagā
ḷi(ri)ki vacē rokhaṁ yē 1 ki [Iṁ]ga 7 lunu vaḍarikagi
tidhāra Aṁgaraṁgavaibhā(bha)vālaku nānnu taḷigalaru
Aṁdō(du)laku vaḷikēnu saṁkurā¨rti(tri) pa¨rvati(dī)pālunu Ama
rēnu tiruvīdhulu vēṁcēśēṭaṁdulaku peṁmmasāni
tiṁmanāyanigāriki puṇyaṁgānu dhārabōsti
mi . dānapālanayō¨rmadhyē dānāśrē(cchrē)yōnupālanaṁ . dā
nātsva¨rgamavāpnōti pālanādacyutaṁ padaṁ . sva
dattādviguṇaṁ puṇyaṁ paradattānupālanaṁ . parada
ttāpahārēṇa svadattaṁ niṣphalaṁ bhavēt . Ēkaivabhaginīlōkē
[sa¨rvē]śā(ṣā)mēva bhūbhujāṁ . nabhōjyā na karagrāhyā vipradattā vasuṁ
dharā
lines are illegible
Digital edition of SII 42.12 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
